notes: First session back after 3 days off. Breathless early on, but pushed through. Moderate knee discomfort on plyos—tolerable and improving. Logged full Lower A session.

exercises.name: Deep Back Squat
exercises.notes: HSR-style for jump power + quad growth. Felt harder than usual. Form breakdown—leaning forward at depth. High heart rate. Needs mobility work + core bracing focus.
Good form overall, but grip/lats were the limiting factor (not posterior chain). Use straps next time. Slight shakiness—likely neuromuscular reactivation.
exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift

exercises.notes: Moderate pump. Not feeling it as well as leg press calf raises. Plan to replace with leg press variation moving forward.
exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise Machine

exercises.notes: HSR Protocol for Jumper’s Knee. 2-leg up, 1-leg down, 3s eccentric. No pain during or after. Great pump and tolerance. Staying on track with tendon remodeling progression.
exercises.name: Leg Extension
Decline Sit-Ups
exercises.notes: Strict form. Full range. Good core activation.
~12” box. Stable landings. Focused on soft absorption and explosive takeoff. Slight knee discomfort, but significantly reduced compared to prior weeks. Green light to continue progressing.
exercises.name: Depth Jumps
EZ Bar Curls
exercises.notes: Arm Hypertrophy Slot. Good biceps activation. Hit close to failure on final set. Full ROM. Controlled tempo. Slight rep drop on 3rd set likely from accumulated fatigue.
